scripts.dev: bun run dev:server & bun run dev:web
scripts.ios: cd apps/mobile && bunx expo prebuild --platform ios --no-clean && bunx expo run:ios
scripts.android: cd apps/mobile && bunx expo prebuild --platform android --no-clean && bunx expo run:android
scripts.ios:sim: cd apps/mobile && bunx expo prebuild --platform ios --no-clean && bunx expo run:ios
scripts.android:sim: cd apps/mobile && bunx expo prebuild --platform android --no-clean && bunx expo run:android
scripts.ios:device: cd apps/mobile && bunx expo prebuild --platform ios --no-clean && bunx expo run:ios --device
scripts.android:device: cd apps/mobile && bunx expo prebuild --platform android --no-clean && bunx expo run:android --device
scripts.ios:release: cd apps/mobile && bunx expo prebuild --platform ios --no-clean && open ios/*.xcworkspace
scripts.android:release: cd apps/mobile && bunx expo prebuild --platform android --no-clean && bunx expo run:android --variant release
scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:apps
